title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
content: “The best revenge is to be unlike him who performed the injury.”

title: A Man for All Seasons
author: Robert Bolt
content: “I think that when a man takes an oath, he's holding his own self in his own hands. Like water. And if he opens his fingers then—he needn't hope to find himself again.”

title: Churchill: A Life
author: Martin Gilbert
content: “Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.”

title: The Last Lion
author: William Manchester
content: “History will be kind to me for I intend to write it.”

title: Washington: A Life
author: Ron Chernow
content: “It is better to offer no excuse than a bad one.”
